texto: We are our stories - dozens, hundreds, thousands of them - sprayed across our memories, embedded in our identity. Calling them up for others or for ourselves or for God, can enlighten, crush, amuse, trap, or free us, depending on how we pay attention.
explicacao: Citação de Emma Lou Warner Thayne sobre temas ligados a fe. “We are our stories - dozens, hundreds, thousands of them - sprayed across our memories, embedded …” articula fe, memories, stories em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como termino e stories.
